---
title: "Jaimni Zhao"
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/profile.jpg")
```

:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left; padding-left: 30px;"}

**Biostatistics & Healthcare Data | RWE & Clinical Research | R, Python, SAS**

MPH Candidate in Biostatistics @ Emory University. Road trip lover with Nemo.

:::
:::
